summary: Completed end-to-end testing of PetalsPort wholesale flower ecommerce. All 12 backend pytest cases passed (root status, categories, products list/filter/detail/404, quote-request create+list, contact, newsletter upsert, email validation). All critical frontend flows verified: Home hero ('Florals, composed.'), categories grid, navbar navigation, Catalog grid (9 products) with search + category filter, Product Detail retail/wholesale price toggle (₹480 -> ₹320), qty controls, Add to Cart with toast and cart badge update, Cart page with item updates and total recalculation, Bulk Quote form submission with thank-you state (POST /api/quote-request), Contact form submission, About page, Category showcase page. No critical defects found.
action_items: DOC: review_request mentioned route '/bulk-quote' but actual route (and all internal nav links) use '/quote'. Either path is fine since all internal references are consistent — main agent may want to add a redirect from /bulk-quote -> /quote so external/marketing links also work.
DOC: review_request mentioned catalog product testid 'product-card-{id}' but actual testid is 'catalog-product-{id}'. Just a documentation discrepancy, not a bug.
critical_code_review_comments: ProductDetail.jsx initialises qty to product.minWholesale (or 10) — clever UX choice (no instant wholesale warning), but means retail default-qty for rose-red-dutch is 50 which surprised the test. Consider defaulting to 1 for retail and switching to minWholesale only when wholesale mode is toggled.
Cart persists via localStorage across sessions (good) but tests showed badge ended at 51 because of cumulative state. Consider a 'reset for QA' or scoping in test env — not blocking.
Backend server.py uses @app.on_event('shutdown') which is deprecated in newer FastAPI in favor of lifespan — non-critical.
All MongoDB queries correctly exclude _id ({'_id': 0}) — verified.

No auth/admin protection on GET /api/quote-request and GET /api/contact — anyone can list all customer leads and contact messages. HIGH PRIORITY for production, but acceptable for MVP without auth as per problem statement.
test_credentials: None — no auth in this iteration
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created TEST_-prefixed quote request, contact message, and newsletter subscription entries in MongoDB collections quote_requests / contact_messages / newsletter. UI flows added 1 product (51 units of rose-red-dutch) to localStorage cart and 1 TEST quote via /quote form.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py is reusable for regression. Frontend testids on Catalog use pattern 'catalog-product-{id}' (not 'product-card-{id}'). Bulk Quote route is '/quote' (not '/bulk-quote'). ProductDetail initial qty = product.minWholesale, so for testing retail flow click qty-decrement multiple times if you need qty=1. Razorpay payment is UI-only (toast on click) — confirmed expected per problem statement.
rca of the issue: No bugs requiring RCA. Initial Playwright run had false negatives due to incorrect selectors/route (product-card vs catalog-product, /bulk-quote vs /quote). After aligning to actual implementation testids, all flows passed cleanly.
